title: View from the Window
subtitle: Ordinary everyday views shared by people from different parts of the world.
instruction: Click the yellow dots to explore what people see from their homes.
aboutText1: We often know famous places from other countries, but rarely see ordinary everyday life.
aboutText2: This project collects small fragments of reality seen through windows around the world.
aboutText3: Some people see forests. Some apartment blocks. Some rivers, rooftops, rain, electric wires, gardens, or quiet streets.
aboutText4: Every photo is ordinary — and that is exactly the point.
joinText: Take a photo from your window, balcony, yard, or everyday surroundings and send it together with your country name.
privacy3: You decide how much information to share.
privacy4: Minimal anonymous analytics are collected to understand how the project is used.
privacy5: You can ask for your photo to be removed later.
